body:
Today’s bake: Roasted Red Pepper, Olive & Feta No-Knead Bread from Terrence Bakes, loaded with Mediterranean flavors and baked to golden perfection in our Riviera Bread Oven.

Shop Oval Bread Oven: https://bit.ly/405xQZ7
Explore Riviera: https://bit.ly/3ONTnTu

Ingredients:  
3 ¾ cups (450g) all-purpose flour 
1 ½ cups (340mL) water, warm  
2 teaspoons kosher salt  
1 tablespoon (14g) instant yeast  
⅓ cup roasted red peppers, chopped 
⅓ cup olives, chopped 
⅓ cup feta cheese 
 
Instructions:  
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, salt and instant yeast. Pour in the warm water and using a spatula or spoon, mix until a shaggy dough forms.

2. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit at room temperature for two hours until the dough has doubled in size. Once doubled, place in the fridge overnight or up to 3 days. 

3. When ready to bake, remove from the fridge and place on a floured work surface. Create a rectangle shape with the dough and add ⅓ of the fillings evenly. Fold the dough in half and add more of the filling. Fold again and add the remaining filling. Shape into an oval shape and cover with a towel or large bowl for 1 hour. 

4. Preheat your oven to 450°F and add a small amount of oil to your bread oven to ensure no sticking occurs. 

5. Carefully place the bread in the oven and use a bread lame to score the top. Bake in the oven covered for 20 minutes. Carefully remove the lid and continue baking for another 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool for about an hour before slicing.
